original_title: STAR-520 One wife ten husband system Morning, noon, evening Iori Furukawa is busy with sex while doing housework every day
overview: My newly-married family is a little strange. Because I have 10 husbands for each person. Every day, morning, noon, evening and housework, I am busy with my husband's partner! And ... if you have a lot of husbands, everyone has 10 people and 10 colors! I have sex anytime, anywhere in the house without any time to rest! I'm busy, but I'm happy to be loved by everyone.
